name: Mini Pekka
info: Mini Pekka: This 3D-printed model depicts a small, mini pekka from clash royal holding an oversized sword. The figure has a chunky, cartoon-like design with rounded armor plates, a solid helmet with a narrow visor, and horn-like decorations on the sides. Its pose—standing firmly with the sword raised—gives it a bold, heroic look. The print shows layered surface texture typical of FDM printing, and the separate armor segments and details make it a fun display piece or collectible miniature.
